import React, { useEffect } from 'react' import '../css/results.css' import { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux' import Result_train from '../components/result_train' import axios from 'axios' export default function Results() { const home_page_info=useSelector((state)=>state.var.home_page_info) useEffect(()=>{ async function search_train(){ const from_to={ from:home_page_info.from, to:home_page_info.to } console.log("Inside useEffect",from_to) await axios.post('http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/train_details',from_to) .then((res)=>{ console.log(res.data.data) }) } search_train(); },[]) return ( <>
